title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant
Any OS. Any Platform
The lobster way

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以帮助用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，旨在让用户轻松运行 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等多种 AI 模型。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能代理项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理工具，旨在辅助开发者进行自动化编码任务。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: Stable Diffusion web UI 是一个基于 Gradio 库的浏览器界面，用于运行 Stable Diffusion 图像生成模型。
highlights: Stable Diffusion web UI
基于 Gradio 库的浏览器界面
运行 Stable Diffusion 图像生成模型

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让社区分享、发现和收集 ChatGPT 提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: A Network Allow-List Won't Stop Exfiltration
summary: 文章指出网络白名单无法有效阻止数据外泄，并探讨了相关安全限制的局限性。
highlights: A Network Allow-List Won't Stop Exfiltration
网络白名单无法阻止数据外泄

title: Dissecting ThunderKittens, anatomy of a compact DSL for high-performance AI kernels
summary: 文章深入剖析了ThunderKittens，一个用于高性能AI内核的紧凑领域特定语言（DSL），探讨了其设计原理、架构和实现细节。
highlights: Dissecting ThunderKittens, anatomy of a compact DSL for high-performance AI kernels
文章详细介绍了ThunderKittens的设计和实现

title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
content: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
summary: OpenAI 被 Gartner 评为 2026 年企业 AI 编码代理领导者，Codex 因创新和企业级部署能力获得认可。
highlights: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents
Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment

title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
content: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.
summary: 维珍大西洋航空利用OpenAI Codex在固定假期旅行截止日期前完成移动应用改造，实现了接近全面的单元测试覆盖和零P1缺陷。
highlights: 在固定假期旅行截止日期前完成应用改造
接近全面的单元测试覆盖
零P1缺陷

title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
summary: NVIDIA 的 Nemotron-Labs 扩散语言模型通过将文本生成建模为去噪过程，实现了接近光速的推理速度，在保持生成质量的同时显著降低延迟，为实时应用提供了高效解决方案。
highlights: 扩散语言模型通过逐步去噪生成文本，而非自回归方式，大幅提升推理速度。
Nemotron-Labs 模型在保持高生成质量的同时，实现了接近光速的文本生成。
该技术适用于实时对话、内容生成等对延迟敏感的场景。

title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
summary: 文章指出在AI采购决策中，专业化（Specialization）比规模（Scale）更具战略价值，强调企业应优先选择针对特定场景优化的AI解决方案，而非盲目追求通用大模型。
highlights: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
企业应优先选择针对特定场景优化的AI解决方案，而非盲目追求通用大模型
